headline: Coinbase Bitcoin Premium Stuck In Negative Territory For 48 Days, Longest Streak On Record
summary: According to SoSoValue, the signal is consistent with around $6 billion in Bitcoin ETF withdrawals year to date, with total net assets now at $74.37 billion, down from a peak of more than $150 billion.

raw.headline: Coinbase Bitcoin Premium Stuck In Negative Territory For 48 Days, Longest Streak On Record
raw.summary: According to SoSoValue, the signal is consistent with around $6 billion in Bitcoin ETF withdrawals year to date, with total net assets now at $74.37 billion, down from a peak of more than $150 billion.

headline: Brokerages Accelerate Rollout of AI Trading Tools as Automated Investing Expands
summary: Brokerage firms are rapidly introducing artificial intelligence-powered trading capabilities, with new offerings ranging from fully autonomous trading agents to AI assistants that require investor approval, according to a recent Jefferies industry overview. Earlier this month, Coinbase Global Inc (NASDAQ:COIN), eToro Group Ltd (NASDAQ:ETOR) and Robinhood Markets Inc (NASDAQ:HOOD) launched fully automated AI agents capable of recommending investments, constructing portfolios and executing trades

headline: Whale's Insight: Circle -40% In A Month, Will OUSD Replace USDC?
summary: Circle plunged 17.5% in a session, extending its monthly loss past 40%, hit by OUSD, a stablecoin led by 140+ major institutions. Read more here.

headline: Bitcoin trades above $62K as U.S. crypto bill gains fresh traction
summary: Investing.com -- Bitcoin traded above $62,000 on Sunday as investors weighed renewed momentum for U.S. cryptocurrency legislation, growing institutional support and fresh reminders that security remains a key risk across the digital asset industry.

headline: Congress Is Trying to Ban the Digital Dollar. What Does That Mean for Crypto Stocks?
summary: Digital dollars lost momentum years ago; the real competition for crypto stocks is traditional finance, not government on-chain money.

raw.headline: Congress Is Trying to Ban the Digital Dollar. What Does That Mean for Crypto Stocks?

headline: Coinbase (COIN) Joins Visa And Mastercard To Launch Open Standard Stablecoin Network
summary: Coinbase Global (NasdaqGS:COIN) has teamed up with Visa and Mastercard to launch the Open Standard stablecoin network, including a new USD-backed stablecoin. The collaboration focuses on using stablecoins for everyday payments across card networks and digital wallets. Coinbase has also become one of the largest corporate political spenders in the 2026 U.S. midterm elections, targeting crypto-related policy and regulation. Coinbase Global enters this phase with a share price of $165.48 and a...
